# dating.branch_cell_stats { #tspaint.dating.branch_cell_stats }

```python
tspaint.dating.branch_cell_stats(Q_of_cell, t_c, t_p, xi, edges, cache=None)
```

Per-cell endpoint-conditioned expected dwell and directional jumps for one branch.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Q_of_cell**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[callable](`callable`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``Q_of_cell(cell_index) -> (K, K)`` generator for that time cell (homogeneous case returns the same ``Q`` for every cell).

<code>[**t_c**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Child and parent node ages (``t_p > t_c``).

<code>[**t_p**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Child and parent node ages (``t_p > t_c``).

<code>[**xi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Endpoint joint posterior ``xi[s_p, s_c]`` for the branch.

<code>[**edges**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Grid cell edges.

<code>[**cache**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[_CellKernels](`tspaint.dating.estep._CellKernels`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   A shared per-cell kernel memo (:class:`_CellKernels`), so the per-cell transition and Van Loan reward integrals are computed once per distinct ``(cell, duration)`` across the whole E-step rather than recomputed for every branch. The result is identical either way — the interior-cell duration is the same float each time. Default ``None`` — a private cache is used for this call (correct, but no cross-branch reuse).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[**dwell**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [ndarray](`ndarray`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``cell_index -> (K,)`` expected dwell per state, conditioned on ``xi``.

<code>[**jumps**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [ndarray](`ndarray`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``cell_index -> (K, K)`` expected ``m -> n`` jumps, conditioned on ``xi``.
